Itumbi alituma 200k Through proxies. Aoko hiyo ni ya pampers ya mtoto “Ol Kalau tunachukua. In fact I will personally be on the ground.” And indeed he was there Ati “si Malava we took? Mbeere we took?” Bro had confidence ya Messi. Went to Ol kalau and was busy playing football at a hotel and calling his father’s age mate “Jofri” Stupid. Na tumbo imejaa minyoo za Gonorrhea . Jofri has finally shut Itumbi’s beak. Never again to speak So ndio uone nikibet 10k, we had assurance. By the way, madam wa Bet, DM uchukue pesa yako I was like, ai, hii, pesa ya bure just for one by-election mbona niache. Are they not the fools that sent me into exile? I do not apologize for the money, I have a month old baby who needs milk and none of you even contributed to my bail money when I was arrested last I checked Si ata watu wa Ol kalau walichukua Gas na Mattress za Ruto na wakapiga wantam? Point is, Ruto is VEEEERY , deeply upset with Itumbi. And Kikuyu Mps who took his money and delivered air Actually, cabinet reshuffle is in the offing. And Cleophas Malala might join I will tell you the rest later. Acha nika nyonyeshe Good morning from my home in Namibia
